headline: Valve says it's ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
summary: Valve's Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set for a summer launch. The delayed hardware was announced in a recent blog post. Valve is excited for players to experience new titles on the new Steam hardware.

headline: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they're getting more personal
summary: Cyberdecks are evolving from laptop-like devices to more personal, disguised forms. TikTok user Annike Tan (@ubeboobey) created a viral mermaid-themed cyberdeck in a purse. These new designs allow users to carry computing power discreetly.

headline: Kevin O'Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve his planned 40,000-acre Utah data center. The decision follows pressure from local residents and activists. He will remove 19,430 acres from the controversial project.

headline: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google is introducing custom search profiles for major creators and publishers in the US. These profiles allow stars to highlight videos, articles, and other online presence directly in search results. The feature is restricted to users with at least 100,000 followers on platforms like YouTube, Instagram, or X.

headline: Cape Fear Episodes 1 & 2 Review
summary: Apple TV's 'Cape Fear' premieres with a lush, suspenseful update. Javier Bardem delivers a menacing performance in the new series. Martin Scorsese and Steven Spielberg executive produced the show.

headline: The Apple Watch Series 11 Drops to $238 During the Early Amazon Resale Prime Day Sale
summary: The Apple Watch Series 11 is available for $238. This special price is part of an early Amazon Resale Prime Day Sale. 'Used: Like New' units are offered in limited quantities.

headline: Walmart Has the Least Expensive GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Prebuilt Gaming PC
summary: Walmart offers the most affordable GeForce RTX 5070 Ti prebuilt gaming PC. The MSI Codez Z2 prebuilt model is priced under $1,750. This deal provides a cost-effective option for a powerful gaming rig.

headline: Xbox CEO Acknowledges Exclusives Are Needed to Build a Platform; Decisions Are Still Being Made
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma states that platform growth requires exclusive titles. The company is actively making ongoing decisions about its exclusive strategy. The statement clarifies Xbox's stance on the importance of unique content.

headline: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
summary: A public spending watchdog discovered Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages. The watchdog is examining property arrangements of various royals. This revelation concerns the financial dealings of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.

headline: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham expressed interest in a Labour leadership contest. His potential candidacy hinges on winning the Makerfield by-election. This signals a potential shift in the Labour party's future leadership.

headline: World-first vaccine designed by AI could protect against whole families of viruses
summary: Cambridge scientists have developed and tested the world's first AI-designed vaccine. The innovative vaccine aims to protect against entire families of viruses. This breakthrough marks a significant advancement in vaccine development technology.

headline: UK in most dangerous period I've known, military chief says
summary: UK military chief Sir Richard Knighton warns of the most dangerous period he's experienced. Russian incursions into UK defenses are risking escalation. Knighton stated these concerns in an interview with the BBC.
